recent.author: slackable.dev
recent.snippet: Quick answers, then the code. *1. Force re-verification?* No API for it — you have to re-trigger from the Slack app config page. The "unverified" state is sticky. Two ways: • Go to `<http://api.slack.com/apps|api.slack.com/apps>` → your app → *Event Subscriptions* → flip *Enable

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: The canary risk level (Critical / At Risk / Stable / Thriving) is decided by *Canary*, Pendo's internal AI model. Every day at 02:15 UTC, a scheduled job analyzes each account by looking at *all* available signals—contract utilization, active CREs, renewal proximity, Pendo Health

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: Product adoption scores come from your contract utilization data in BigQuery. The *overall module adoption score* (what you see on account cards) reflects how many of the ~60 recent business days the customer actively used *any* Pendo module — bucketed as No Usage, Low (≤40%), Me

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: The *Renewal Proximity* score is one component of Pulse's health calculation. It measures how far away an account is from its renewal date: • Accounts *more than 180 days* from renewal get the full 15 points (low urgency) • Accounts *less than 30 days* from renewal get only 2 poi
